## Category
**Cluster:** Identity Security

---

## Product Brief
1. CyberArk is a global leader in identity security, providing comprehensive solutions to secure human and machine identities across any device, anywhere, at just the right time.
2. Their AI-powered Identity Security Platform applies intelligent privilege controls with continuous threat prevention, detection, and response across the entire identity lifecycle.
3. The platform enables zero trust and least privilege, simplifying access management with secure SSO, Adaptive MFA, Lifecycle Management, and is recognized as a market leader in Privileged Access Management (PAM).

---

## RSA 2026 Highlights
- Palo Alto Networks completed its $25 billion acquisition of CyberArk on February 11, 2026, establishing Identity Security as a core pillar of its platformization strategy to secure human, machine, and agentic identities.
- CyberArk is anchoring its 2026 growth strategy on machine identity security, elevating PKI, Certificate Lifecycle Management (CLM), and AI agent governance, positioning identity as the foundational platform layer in modern zero trust and cloud operating models.
- New CyberArk capabilities include AI agent discovery, access management, and governance, extending zero standing privilege (ZSP) to AI-driven automations and toolchain components.

---

## Top Questions to Ask
- [ ] How will CyberArk's integration with Palo Alto Networks enhance its Identity Security Platform and benefit existing customers?
- [ ] What are the key strategies and solutions CyberArk is offering to address the evolving threats posed by AI agents and machine identities?
- [ ] Can you elaborate on the practical implementation of Zero Standing Privilege (ZSP) in cloud environments and how it helps achieve compliance and governance?
